label: Emporio Italia
product: Rovagnati - Mortadella IGP 'Massima' con Pistacchio in 1/2 - 2,5kg
question: Why does Mortadella still have ~€0.78–€3.50 residual after v28?

verdict.label: discount_extraction
verdict.summary: Pass C fails to populate discount_pct (10,00) and gross_unit_price (11,10 €), then emits line_total_net ≈ qty×misread unit (27.57) instead of copying Preço Total 31,07 €. Prosciutto/Ventricina closed because v24/v25 added explicit Desc.(%) examples; Mortadella shares the plain-decimal pattern but has no worked example. v28 VALOR block targets weight/case rows, not discount lines.

expectedRecoveryNote: Up to €3.50 on v28 lab run; €0.78 on v27 tail; stability avg ~€4.09 — all recoverable when line_total_net=31.07
